sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Value Chain Position & Business Model
required_elements: Space value chain classification (launch provider, satellite manufacturer, satellite operator, ground segment, data analytics, in-space services)
Business model sustainability (government contracts vs. commercial customers ratio)
Government revenue visibility vs. commercial speed and price sensitivity dynamics

sections.title: Launch Economics (for Launch Providers)
required_elements: Cost per kg to orbit (LEO, GTO, other relevant orbits) vs. SpaceX Falcon 9 benchmark (~$2,700/kg)
Reusability economics (flights per booster, refurbishment costs, amortized vehicle cost)
Launch cadence (demonstrated launches per year vs. manifest)
Manifest backlog value (total contracted launch revenue not yet recognized)

sections.title: Constellation Economics (for Satellite Operators)
required_elements: Per-satellite cost (manufacturing + launch + insurance)
Constellation completion percentage and de-risking status
Spectrum allocation assessment (ITU coordination, interference disputes)
Terminal/user equipment cost and margin (subsidy drag assessment)
Revenue per subscriber/customer vs. cost to serve unit economics

sections.title: Orbital Debris & Insurance Risk
required_elements: Orbital debris and collision probability assessment (LEO congestion analysis)
Conjunction event rate and collision avoidance capability
Space insurance pricing trends and availability as margin headwind

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: Launch company valuation (EV/Revenue, manifest backlog analysis, cost-curve trajectory)
Constellation operator valuation (subscriber-based DCF, EV/deployed satellite, ARPU analysis)
Milestone-based probability-weighted NPV for pre-revenue companies

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Launch cost trajectory and competitive positioning vs. SpaceX
Spectrum rights and regulatory approval timeline
Defense/intelligence contract pipeline analysis

structural_requirements: All sections present with markdown headings
Space value chain position clearly identified with classification of company's primary layer
Government vs. commercial revenue ratio documented with visibility/cycle time implications
Cost per kg to orbit calculated and compared to SpaceX Falcon 9 benchmark
Reusability economics detailed (booster reuse rate, refurbishment costs per flight)
Launch manifest backlog quantified with timeframe for conversion to revenue
Per-satellite cost breakdown (manufacturing, launch, insurance) calculated
Constellation completion percentage documented with deployment timeline
Spectrum allocation status and ITU coordination risks assessed
Terminal equipment cost and subsidy impact on unit economics quantified
Revenue per subscriber and cost to serve analyzed for commercial viability
Orbital debris and collision probability mapped for relevant orbital regimes
Space insurance costs trending and impact on margins assessed
Investigation tracks include specific cost benchmarking sources, spectrum filing data, and defense contract sources
